tasks.prompt: Ish papkangда Dockerfile yarat: FROM alpine va CMD bilan 'imtihon16' chiqarsin.
O'sha Dockerfile'dan image qur:  docker build -t examimg .
examimg ni ishga tushirib chiqishini 'out.txt' ga yoz — 'imtihon16' bo'lsin (docker run --rm examimg).
examimg ni versiya bilan tagla:  docker build -t examimg:1.0 .
'web.Dockerfile' yarat: FROM, WORKDIR, COPY va EXPOSE direktivalari bo'lsin.
